audit_items.proof_trace: Validation checks execute in wrong order: expensive getBlockSlotState (check 7, line 101) runs before cheap signature verification (check 5, line 129). Spec mandates check 5 before check 7 to minimize wasted work on invalid messages.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker floods P2P network with data column sidecars having valid headers but invalid proposer signatures. Each message triggers expensive state lookups before rejection, exhausting node resources and degrading network performance.
